capital_contract.open_portfolio_worst_case_loss_cap: The configured time-group loss budget is also the maximum aggregate entry cost at risk across every unresolved market.
capital_contract.risk_capital: The lower of settled equity and initial capital; unresolved payouts and profits never increase sizing authority.

economic_chronology.candidate_order: Local monotonic decision arrival, then local wall time, asset, condition ID, and sample ID.
economic_chronology.same_group_accounting: One PnL point per shared BTC/ETH/SOL market-start group, recognized no earlier than the latest official resolution used by a filled position in that group.
economic_chronology.unknown_execution: Blocks all later portfolio exposure until reconciliation and grants no economic credit.

model_admission.minimum_per_asset_outcomes: Each of BTC, ETH, and SOL must independently meet minimum_outcome_markets_per_split for both Up and Down in train, validation, and untouched test roles.

reporting_contract.drawdown_basis: Official-resolution realized equity only; this is not intraperiod mark-to-market drawdown.
